payload.title: Flushing Traffic Management
payload.publisher: New York City Department of Transportation
payload.description: Presentation about construction mitigation during Main Street sidewalk widening and southbound bus-only restriction in Downtown Flushing

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.entity_name: New York City Department of Transportation

payload.description: 13 MTA bus routes use Main Street near Roosevelt Avenue
DDC and utility work may provide obstructions
CB7 request for 2-way conversion of 39 Ave between Prince St and Main St
Sheraton request for 2-way conversion of 39 Ave between Prince St & Main St to increase access opportunities
Active presence of traffic enforcement agents during early weeks of construction
Q44 SBS fare machines relocated between 37th-38th Avenues during construction
Q20A/B routes served in Downtown Flushing

payload.location: Main Street between 38th Av and 40th Rd
payload.description: Sidewalks will be widened on Main Street between 38th Av and 40th Rd up to 8' to create more uniform sidewalk and roadway width. Will reduce crowding, improve safety. Construction is currently underway, and is scheduled to increase extents in 2017.

location_normalized.raw_text: Main Street between 38th Av and 40th Rd

payload.location: Main Street from Northern Boulevard to 40th Road
payload.description: Restrict Southbound traffic on Main Street to buses and local deliveries only from Northern Boulevard to 40th Road. All general traffic must exit Main Street at 37th Avenue. Trucks with deliveries on Main Street can continue through.

location_normalized.raw_text: Main Street from Northern Boulevard to 40th Road

tool_args.label: Northern Blvd at Prince St Traffic & Safety Study

payload.project_name: Northern Blvd at Prince St Traffic & Safety Study
payload.description: DOT is currently studying traffic & safety at this intersection. Community requests to allow eastbound right turn from Northern Blvd main roadway coming off bridge.

payload.location: 39 Av between Prince St and Main St
payload.description: CB7 & Sheraton request for 2-way conversion of 39 Av between Prince St & Main St. Increases access opportunities to Sheraton & parking from Prince St.

location_normalized.raw_text: 39 Av between Prince St and Main St

payload.description: Main Street in Downtown Flushing, Queens. Key corridor with bus routes, sidewalk widening project, and proposed southbound bus-only restriction.

payload.location: Main Street between 38th Av and 40th Rd

payload.claim_text: Most drivers do not park on Main Street
payload.description: Flushing Shoppers Survey finding about driver parking behavior

payload.claim_text: Main St traffic volumes are low near Northern Blvd, especially in southbound direction. Most traffic is not making a through trip on Main Street based on aerial study.
payload.description: Aerial study findings about traffic patterns on Main Street

payload.claim_text: Major improvement in travel time and reliability for southbound buses. Northbound buses and traffic will benefit from having fewer conflicting SB vehicles blocking turns. Local and emergency access needs preserved.
Diverted traffic can be absorbed by nearby southbound alternative streets such as College Point Boulevard and Union Street
